explanation.title: 短歌行
explanation.author: 曹操
explanation.line_text: 青青子衿，悠悠我心

explanation.title: 短歌行
explanation.author: 曹操
explanation.line_text: 月明星稀，乌鹊南飞

explanation.title: 迢迢牵牛星
explanation.author: 佚名
explanation.line_text: 迢迢牵牛星，皎皎河汉女

explanation.title: 迢迢牵牛星
explanation.author: 佚名
explanation.line_text: 纤纤擢素手，札札弄机杼

explanation.title: 临江仙
explanation.author: 杨慎
explanation.line_text: 青山依旧在，几度夕阳红

explanation.title: 临江仙
explanation.author: 杨慎
explanation.line_text: 白发渔樵江渚上，惯看秋月春风

explanation.title: 句其五
explanation.author: 卞震
explanation.line_text: 积雨生残稻，苍苔入旧笼

explanation.title: 句其八
explanation.author: 卞震
explanation.line_text: 双阙暂随丹诏入，三峰寻与白云归

explanation.title: 望江南・忆江南
explanation.author: 陈朴
explanation.line_text: 中黄宝，须向胆中求

explanation.title: 望江南・忆江南
explanation.author: 陈朴
explanation.line_text: 玄珠降，丹窟在中宫

explanation.title: 归隠
explanation.author: 陈抟
explanation.line_text: 十年踪迹走红尘，回首青山入梦频

explanation.title: 归隠
explanation.author: 陈抟
explanation.line_text: 紫陌纵荣争及睡，朱门虽贵不如贫

explanation.title: 生查子
explanation.author: 陈亚
explanation.line_text: 相思意已深，白纸书难足

explanation.title: 生查子
explanation.author: 陈亚
explanation.line_text: 琵琶闲抱理相思，必拨朱弦断

explanation.title: 凤栖梧・蝶恋花
explanation.author: 丁谓
explanation.line_text: 玉梯相对开蓬岛

explanation.title: 凤栖梧・蝶恋花
explanation.author: 丁谓
explanation.line_text: 太液微波，绿斗王孙草

explanation.title: 鹤冲天
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 台榭绿阴浓，薰风细

explanation.title: 鹤冲天
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 单夹衣裳，半栊软玉肌体

explanation.title: 诫儿姪八百字
explanation.author: 范质
explanation.line_text: 青袍春草色，白纻弃如仇

explanation.title: 诫儿姪八百字
explanation.author: 范质
explanation.line_text: 吾家本寒素，门地寡公侯

explanation.title: 苏幕遮
explanation.author: 范仲淹
explanation.line_text: 碧云天，黄叶地

explanation.title: 苏幕遮
explanation.author: 范仲淹
explanation.line_text: 秋色连波，波上寒烟翠

explanation.title: 迷仙引
explanation.author: 关咏
explanation.line_text: 岸柳参差，袅袅金丝细

explanation.title: 迷仙引
explanation.author: 关咏
explanation.line_text: 慵缓步，眉敛金铺倚

explanation.title: 迢迢牵牛星
explanation.author: 佚名
explanation.line_text: 迢迢牵牛星，皎皎河汉女

explanation.title: 相和歌辞王昭君二首二
explanation.author: 白居易
explanation.line_text: 汉使却回凭寄语，黄金何日赎蛾眉

explanation.title: 相和歌辞反白头吟
explanation.author: 白居易
explanation.line_text: 火不热真玉，蝇不点清冰

explanation.title: 相见欢
explanation.author: 李煜
explanation.line_text: 林花谢了春红，太匆匆

explanation.title: 相见欢
explanation.author: 李煜
explanation.line_text: 胭脂泪，相留醉，几时重

explanation.title: 一络索・一落萦
explanation.author: 陈凤仪

explanation.line_text: 常饮玉壶浆

explanation.line_text: 白发渔樵江渚上，惯看秋月春风

explanation.line_text: 青山依旧在，几度夕阳红

explanation.title: 己亥杂诗
explanation.author: 龚自珍
explanation.line_text: 浩荡离愁白日斜，吟鞭东指即天涯

explanation.title: 己亥杂诗
explanation.author: 龚自珍
explanation.line_text: 落红不是无情物，化作春泥更护花

explanation.title: 内宴奉诏作
explanation.author: 曹翰
explanation.line_text: 曾因国难披金甲，不为家贫卖宝刀

explanation.title: 惜春令
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 小庭杨柳黄金翠，桃脸两三枝

explanation.title: 惜春令
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 篱边散、嫩菊开金

explanation.title: 丑奴儿・采桑子
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 人生乐事知多少，且酌金杯

explanation.title: 题石水涧
explanation.author: 陈抟
explanation.line_text: 银河洒落翠光冷，一派回环湛晚晖

explanation.title: 与毛女游
explanation.author: 陈抟
explanation.line_text: 回指归去路，相将入翠烟

explanation.title: 惜春令

explanation.line_text: 小庭杨柳黄金翠，桃脸两三枝

explanation.title: 踏莎行
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 蓦然旧事上心头，无言敛皱眉山翠

explanation.line_text: 白发渔樵江渚上，惯看秋月春风

explanation.line_text: 粉骨碎身浑不怕，要留清白在人间

explanation.title: 望江南・忆江南
explanation.author: 陈朴
explanation.line_text: 胎色渐红阴渐小，推移岁运助干刚

explanation.title: 数日来顿疏酬唱若无牵率宁度鬰蒸辄贡狂吟用惊昼寝
explanation.author: 李昉
explanation.line_text: 若无啸月吟风侣，争度流金铄石天

explanation.title: 和暑夜偶作之什
explanation.author: 李昉
explanation.line_text: 一轩明月谁为伴，应共金昆醉复醒

explanation.title: 望汉月・忆汉月
explanation.author: 李遵
explanation.line_text: 绿藓上，乱铺金蕊

explanation.title: 长相思
explanation.author: 柳永
explanation.line_text: 清都绛阙夜景，风传银箭，露叆金茎

explanation.title: 寄孟宾于
explanation.author: 李昉
explanation.line_text: 幼携书剑别湘潭，金榜标名第十三

explanation.title: 望远行
explanation.author: 柳永
explanation.line_text: 藻井凝尘，金梯铺藓，寂寞凤楼十二

explanation.title: 望远行
explanation.author: 柳永
explanation.line_text: 但暗掷、金钗买醉

explanation.title: 离别难
explanation.author: 柳永
explanation.line_text: 美韶容、何啻值千金

explanation.title: 玉楼春
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 玉杯齐举乐音谐，遥想金阶天仗晓

explanation.title: 朝玉阶・朝天子
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 黄金才钺掩银屏

explanation.title: 朝玉阶・朝天子
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 千金一笑，须信倾城

explanation.title: 又捧新诗见褒陋止睹五章之绮丽如九奏之凄清其末章末句云谁比天人福皆从积善招天人之比固不敢当积善之征其来有自味嘉言之若是省薄德以何胜仰谢良知谨次来韵以老去心何用为首希垂采览其五
explanation.author: 李昉
explanation.line_text: 有时思绿蚁，几度换金貂

explanation.title: 踏莎行
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 画梁新燕一双双，玉笼鹦鹉爱孤睡

explanation.title: 山亭柳
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 玉容淡妆添寂寞

explanation.title: 菊花新
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 罗帏翠屏空，风微动、玉炉烟飐

explanation.title: 凤栖梧・蝶恋花
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 玉容寂寞双眉聚

explanation.title: 临江仙
explanation.author: 杨慎
explanation.line_text: 白发渔樵江渚上，惯看秋月春风

explanation.title: 贫女
explanation.author: 曹衍
explanation.line_text: 满头白发为新妇，笑杀豪家年少儿

explanation.title: 渔家傲
explanation.author: 范仲淹
explanation.line_text: 将军白发征夫泪

explanation.title: 剔银灯
explanation.author: 范仲淹
explanation.line_text: 一品与千金，问白发、如何回避

explanation.title: 燕归梁
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 金盆水，弄纤纤

explanation.title: 六州
explanation.author: 和岘
explanation.line_text: 混并寰宇，休牛归马，销金偃革，蹈咏庆昌期

explanation.title: 凤归云
explanation.author: 柳永
explanation.line_text: 恋帝里，金谷园林，平康巷陌，触处繁华，连日疏狂，未尝轻负，寸心双眼

explanation.title: 燕归梁
explanation.author: 柳永
explanation.line_text: 字值千金

explanation.title: 菊花新
explanation.author: 杜安世
explanation.line_text: 罗帏翠屏空，风微动、玉炉烟飐

explanation.title: 御街行
explanation.author: 范仲淹
explanation.line_text: 真珠帘卷玉楼空，天淡银河垂地

explanation.title: 玉楼春
explanation.author: 柳永
explanation.line_text: 金丝玉管咽春空，蜡炬兰灯烧晓色

explanation.title: 河桥楼赋得群公夜䜩
explanation.author: 谭用之
explanation.line_text: 杯黏紫酒金螺重，谈转雕珰玉麈空
